name: The Addiction - Afraid of Monsters
description:
Giving him a voice.

Be patient with him :3

Requested by Anonymous!

Since I believe most of us aren't familiar with teaching sign language, uh, it's pretty simple, at least that's what I saw when I searched it up.

ASL has its own grammar. It's very straightforward. For example, you don't say, "I am going to teach you sign language." You say, "SIGNS I TEACH YOU."

So teaching starts with basic vocabulary rather than the alphabet, as in many other languages. I think you learn the alphabet later on to sign words you don't know the sign for.

That's all that you need to know!

Ok... I think maybe tmr I will leave the psychward. I'm praying that I do because I'm going insane in here...

omg I just remembered shit I forgot like that one time when someone put images in their request but I forgot to put the images in the bot description help,, also five days ago when I promised to write a movie about Kevin but I completely forgot.. I EVENTUALLY will hopefully do that.

I need reminders </3
